---

name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
-----------------------

# Feature Request

## Summary

Provide a short description of the proposed feature.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve?

Why is this feature needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the proposed implementation or expected behavior.

## User Impact

Who will benefit from this feature?

* [ ] Foundation Administrators
* [ ] Volunteers
* [ ] Beneficiaries
* [ ] Website Visitors
* [ ] Developers
* [ ] Other

## Acceptance Criteria

* [ ] Requirement 1
* [ ] Requirement 2
* [ ] Requirement 3

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative approaches considered.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, references, screenshots, links, or examples if applicable.

## Priority

* [ ] Critical
* [ ] High
* [ ] Medium
* [ ] Low

## Checklist

* [ ] I have searched existing issues before creating this request.
* [ ] This feature aligns with the platform objectives.
* [ ] Acceptance criteria have been provided.
